posts.raw_content: Sometimes the vaccine looks right at ya. Right into your eyes. And the thing about a vaccine is it's got lifeless eyes. Black eyes. Like a doll's eyes. When it comes at ya, it doesn't even seem to be livin'... 'til it bites ya, and those black eyes roll over white and then... ah then you hear that terrible high-pitched screamin'. The ocean turns red, and despite all your poundin' and your hollerin' those vaccines come in and... they rip you to pieces. You know that was the time I was most frightened. Waitin' for my turn. I'll never take a vaccine again.
